title: eriogonum batemanii var. ostlundii
intro: Eriogonum batemanii var. ostlundii, also known as Bateman's buckwheat, is a perennial plant species belonging to the buckwheat family (Polygonaceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which help to soothe wounds and prevent infections. The health benefits of Eriogonum batemanii var. ostlundii include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and support the immune system. The plant can be used to make herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed orally to reap its medicinal benefits.
